title: New Item in this group then change status
excerpt: I am wanting to create an automation that when a new email arrives, it goes into Project Email group (managed to do this part) and then the status change to say New Email. Then another automation would send a message via…

posts.author: RobynL13 (Robyn L)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am wanting to create an automation that when a new email arrives, it goes into Project Email group (managed to do this part) and then the status change to say New Email. Then another automation would send a message via Slack to a Project Channel that there is a new email.

I have tried the automation recipes and also creating a custom automation but I can’t see to get it to work. Is what I have described possible?

posts.author: helen_loop2 (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: I am after the exact same solution please!

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: I think when following this setup How to create conditional logic on integrations for monday.com you shoul be able to create what you are describing, no?

posts.author: helen_loop2 (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the suggestion - what would the recipe be? I can get it to go to the group and send a message to slack, however the bit missing for me is the status automatically changing once its in the group.
